description: Use this API to return switched shunt model name. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr, cval = swsmnam_2(ibus,id)

error_codes.description: Switched shunt not in network but in model tables; ‘CVAL’ returned.
Switched shunt not in network or in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
No model in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
